title: Ding Dong Lyrics Jigarthanda Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Ding Dong
Singers: Arunraja, Moses
Music:  Santhosh Narayanan
Movie: Jigarthanda

En perai kettu, kaal nadunga
solladha unnai endru, vaai adaikka
enmeedhu kobam ingu por thodukka
en pinne veesa ingum vaal edukka

Ding dong unna katti vachi, udhappen
ding dong unna etti etti, midhippen
ding dong un kai kaala, murippen
ding dong unna savadichi, erippen

ding dong un kai kaala, murippen
ding dong unna savadichi, erippen

ding dong unna etti etti, midhippen
ding dong un kai kaala, murippen
ding dong unna savadichi, erippen

Villadhi villen endru per eduthu
seiyyaadha paavamellaam serthu vaikka
illadhaa thappu ellaam panni paarthu
oorengum ennai pattri eppozhudhum
pesa vaikka

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Ding Dong'?

The song 'Ding Dong' conveys a playful and energetic vibe, celebrating love and joy through its catchy lyrics and upbeat rhythm.

How does 'Ding Dong' fit into the plot of Jigarthanda?

This song is a lively number that enhances the festive moments in Jigarthanda, showcasing the characters' carefree and joyful interactions.

Who are the singers of 'Ding Dong'?

The song features the talented voices of Arun Raja and Moses, bringing a unique blend of energy to the track.

Who composed the music for 'Ding Dong'?

The music for 'Ding Dong' was composed by Santhosh Narayanan, known for his innovative and catchy tunes in Tamil cinema.

When was 'Ding Dong' released?

'Ding Dong' was released on March 5, 2014, as part of the Jigarthanda soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Ding Dong', the characters express their carefree spirit through a lively and upbeat melody that resonates with joy and celebration. The song captures the essence of youthful exuberance, making it a perfect fit for festive occasions. With its catchy lyrics and energetic beats, it evokes feelings of happiness and excitement. This track stands out as a highlight in the movie, enhancing the overall fun atmosphere.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Ding Dong from Jigarthanda is a vibrant celebration of energy and rhythm, featuring the dynamic vocals of Arun Raja and Moses. With Santhosh Narayanan's infectious beats, this track is sure to get you on your feet and dancing. Experience the lively essence of this song that perfectly captures the spirit of fun and festivity!
stanzaMeanings: When I call your name, don't just walk away. If you get angry with me, it will only lead to more trouble. You keep following me everywhere, trying to take advantage.
Ding dong, I tie you up, then ding dong, I pull you closer. Ding dong, your hands are tied, then ding dong, I will eat you up, and I will rise.
Ding dong, I tie you up, then ding dong, I pull you closer. Ding dong, your hands are tied, then ding dong, I will eat you up, and I will rise.
Ding dong, I tie you up, then ding dong, I pull you closer. Ding dong, your hands are tied, then ding dong, I will eat you up, and I will rise.
They take the name of a villain and do not act on it, but they gather all the innocent ones. They don't do anything wrong, yet they always talk about me in the town.
Ding dong, I tie you up, then ding dong, I pull you closer. Ding dong, your hands are tied, then ding dong, I will eat you up, and I will rise.
